repair_actions.details: Refactor Section 4.1 from paper-by-paper catalog to integrated body text. ShaSpec Deep Evidence quantitative findings (2.2pp gap, L1 optimal, sensitivity analysis) must be woven into Theme 2 body text — not a standalone subsection. HistDiST Deep Evidence findings (v-prediction 39% FID reduction, ablation breakdown) must be woven into Theme 3 with an ablation table — not a standalone subsection. Deep evidence subsections may be reduced to brief supplementary notes.

Gap 1: Add practical feasibility layer to the CM-GAN pathologist acceptance study. Explain why it is a tractable near-term research problem: (1) requires only study design, not new image acquisition; (2) can follow Roche Navify study as design template; (3) results directly answer Gap 1's core question. This frames the gap as tractable rather than merely a gap.
